name: grepping
description: Shell code/text search skill (rg, ast-grep, grep-family) with rg-over-grep and rg-failure nudge hooks

interface.shortDescription: Code/text search skill for rg, ast-grep, and grep-family tools.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the grepping plugin. Reuses the grepping skill covering ripgrep (rg), ast-grep (sg), and grep-family translation, plus the advisory rg-over-grep / rg-failure nudge hooks.
defaultPrompt: Translate this grep command to ripgrep.
Why is my rg search returning nothing?
Write an ast-grep pattern to match this code shape.
